markdown:
Orientation complete. Inbox is clean (2 open info: `I-0105` latest run-0010 status + `I-0107` my T13 scope note; `I-0104` archived as superseded; `I-0106` carries the detailed T13 carve-map for Horizon).

## Summary
Opening Ground for run 0011, task **T13** (retire the stale genus-0 / Route-C split). No prior Horizon diff to review. Verified T13's scope and dependency picture, left orientation notes, and flagged one dependency trap plus a scope gap.

## Progress
- recommendation.md: written — 4 bullets pointing Horizon at `roadmap.md`, `WeilDivisor.lean` carve, memory `I-0106`, and the scope gap.
- roadmap.md: no edit (Horizon's task) — confirmed stale lines ~66/72/77/120 still list deleted `Genus0BaseObjects/*` as "sorry-free in-tree" and "Route C paused"; this is the main in-scope inconsistency.
- WeilDivisor.lean: no edit — confirmed dual-purpose; `PrimeDivisor`/`RationalMap.order` substrate is imported by active `Albanese/CodimOneExtension.lean`; only the `-- Route C PAUSE` degree/RR→ℙ¹ block (~5 sorries) is dead genus-0 weight.
- RigidityLemma.lean: no edit — line 787 has stale "genus-0 base case (Route C)" prose over sorry-free math.
- Inbox: filed `I-0107` (info→human, T13 scope note); archived `I-0104` (superseded run-0010 reconcile). `I-0106` already covers the Horizon-facing carve-map.

## Issues
- Scope gap: residual genus-0 doc comments live in `AbelJacobi.lean`, `Jacobian.lean`, and `Genus.lean` (broken `.archon/STRATEGY.md` pointer) — all outside T13's write globs. A full sweep needs those three added to scope. Flagged in `I-0107`.
- Do-not-delete: a wholesale delete of `WeilDivisor.lean` would break `ALB.codim1`'s build.
- Ambiguity: "Route-C" also names a live alternative (coherent-χ) endgame for the 5 headline Quot reps decls (`I-0086`) — distinct from the dead genus-0-base Route-C; pruning must not conflate them.
- Build not re-run this session (no code changed); state inherited green from run 0010 (`I-0105`, 8646 jobs, exit 0).

## Why I stopped
Task complete: this is an opening orientation round, not the implementation. Scope sanity-checked, traps flagged, notes left for Horizon; the actual removal/reconciliation is T13's Horizon work.

## Next
- Horizon (T13): update `roadmap.md` to drop deleted `Genus0BaseObjects`/genus-0-base entries; surgically carve the Route-C RR→ℙ¹ block from `WeilDivisor.lean` (keep `PrimeDivisor`/`order`); clean genus-0 prose in `RigidityLemma.lean`.
- Human: consider adding `AbelJacobi.lean`, `Jacobian.lean`, `Genus.lean` to T13 scope if a fully clean comment sweep is wanted (see `I-0107`).
recommendation:
# Orientation — run 0011, T13 (retire the stale genus-0 / Route-C split)

- Useful context: the genus split is **already retired in Lean** — `Genus0BaseObjects/*`, `AbelianVarietyRigidity.lean`, `RationalCurveIso.lean`, and `genusZeroWitness`/`positiveGenusWitness` are gone from the AJC tree; `Jacobian C := (jacobianWitness C).J` is uniform (no `dite`, no genus-branching code anywhere — confirmed). T13 is prose/dead-math residue cleanup plus a roadmap reconcile. A precise file:line cleanup manifest for this whole surface is at **`t13-cleanup-manifest.md`** in this session dir — it is the primary handoff; the durable "carve don't delete" fact is memory `I-0106`.

- Relevant files (all in scope): `RiemannRoch/WeilDivisor.lean` is dual-purpose — the `Scheme.PrimeDivisor`/`RationalMap.order`/`IsRegularInCodimensionOne` substrate (L55–830) is imported by `Albanese/CodimOneExtension.lean` (live `ALB.codim1`), the RR→ℙ¹ `degree`/`principal_degree_zero`/`positivePart` block (§3–§6, ~L836–1330) is dead genus-0 weight; carving it drops the L1138 sorry, leaving 1 (L830). Watch the `order_one` lemma at L1002–1015 (a keep-lemma interleaved in the delete cluster). `RigidityLemma.lean:786–787` has stale "genus-0 base case (Route C)" prose over live math.

- `roadmap.md` reconcile (in scope), section-aware: the **AJC** section (L64–78) has the stale claims — L70 (`Genus0BaseObjects` "sorry-free in-tree"), L72 (obsolete-`RiemannRoch`-extraction clause + `×2`→`×1`), and L64–65 (`Cotangent`/`Differentials`/standalone `Rigidity` — verify). The **`## Albanese`** section (L106–120: L112–113, L120) is *correct* — those `Genus0BaseObjects/{BareScheme,Points}` files genuinely exist under `SubProjects/Albanese`, so leave them. (This corrects my earlier note and `I-0107`, which lumped L120 in with the stale AJC lines.)

- Blueprint / build notes: blueprint `.tex` source is already genus-0-free in `content.tex`; residual stale prose sits in `RiemannRoch_WeilDivisor.tex` (RR.1–RR.4 bridge framing), `Albanese_AlbaneseUP.tex` (a paused-gating NOTE), and a dead `\label{chap:avr_for_rr}` in `AbelianVarietyRigidity.tex` — `Picard_FGAPicRepresentability.tex` Route-C prose is the *live* coherent-χ face, keep it. `blueprint/web/` is a stale Jun-17 build (15 orphan HTML incl. 7 genus-0/RR-route) — regenerate, don't hand-edit. The DAG "2 dangling" are two unresolved `\uses` in `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (`lem:gr_glueChartFamily_pullback_map_pi`, `lem:gr_glueChartComponent_leg_compat`) — pure hygiene, unrelated to genus-0. Build state inherited green from run 0010 (`lake build` 8646 jobs; `I-0105`). Out-of-scope broken `.archon/STRATEGY.md` pointers live in `Genus.lean`, `AbelJacobi.lean`, `Cohomology/{SheafCompose,StructureSheafAb,StructureSheafModuleK}.lean` — see `t13-cleanup-manifest.md` §2 if the human widens scope.
